source_meta.system_name: InterTAN / TRIGEN Hip Fracture Nail System

TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official Smith+Nephew materials support the INTERTAN hip fracture nail with dedicated operative instrumentation.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official materials describe the intertrochanteric antegrade nail platform for proximal femur fracture fixation.
Official materials describe the integrated lag screw as part of the hip fracture fixation construct.
Official materials describe the interlocking compression screw that maintains active compression and rotational stability.

row.system_name: InterTAN / TRIGEN Hip Fracture Nail System
row.system_notes: Hip fracture nailing platform within the TRIGEN family using the INTERTAN integrated compression screw construct.
